articles.title: Who was Gaspi? Argentine YouTuber dies alongside Oliver Tree in Rio helicopter crash
articles.description: Gaspar Prim DiŐĀaz, known online as Gaspi, was a 23-year-old Argentine YouTuber famous for his street comedy, improvised interviews, and signature greeting ‚ÄúBuenass.‚ÄĚ He became one of Argentina‚Äôs most popular digital creators and later gained wider attention through La Velada del AnŐÉo V. Gaspi died in the Rio de Janeiro helicopter crash that also killed singer Oliver Tree and four others.

articles.title: Twitch streamer Clavicular revealed his post-surgery face as years of looksmaxxing content came under fire
articles.description: Braden Peters, better known as Kick streamer Clavicular, went viral after asking viewers not to mock his swollen face following multiple cosmetic procedures. The request sparked strong reactions because of his long history of promoting extreme appearance-focused practices and criticizing looks. The debate has since expanded into a larger discussion about influencer culture, cosmetic trends, and online accountability.

articles.title: Kartik Aaryan Celebrates Rumoured Girlfriend Sreeleela's Birthday With Cute Pic And Nickname; See Her 'Sweetest' Reply
articles.description: Kartik Aaryan sparked fresh dating rumours with Sreeleela after sharing an adorable birthday post featuring the duo on a bike ride. Calling her "Sree Sree," Kartik received a sweet "Thank you sweetest" reply.

articles.title: Arjun Punjj: Yaadein keeps things relatable while adding a refreshing twist ‚ÄĒ that‚Äôs what makes it stand out
articles.description: Actor Arjun Punjj discusses his role as Diggy in 'Yaadein,' a character known for his calm demeanor and ability to de-escalate conflict. Punjj highlights Diggy's maturity and balanced approach as his key strengths, making him a stabilizing influence. He shares a memorable early scene and the challenge of portraying such restraint.

articles.title: When Sonam Kapoor justified calling 36-year old Aishwarya Rai 'aunty'
articles.description: Sonam Kapoor's controversial 'aunty' comment about Aishwarya Rai in 2009 sparked debate, though Rai never publicly responded. Years later, Kapoor explained it was due to Rai's past work with her father. Lingering rumors of a feud were dispelled when Rai attended Kapoor's 2018 wedding.

articles.description: Diljit Dosanjh's Main Vaapas Aaunga emerged as the weekend winner, collecting s 5.50 crore net in three days. Meanwhile, Kangana Ranaut's Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata collected Rs 4.25 crore over its opening weekend.

articles.description: During BTS ARIRANG concert in Busan, Jungkook spotted a fan holding a plushie resembling V's beloved dog Yeontan. V's delighted reaction went viral, reminding fans of Yeontan's special place in BTS history and members' shared affection for the late pet.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were supposed to get married yesterday, June 13th ‚ÄĒ so what do we actually know about their wedding?
articles.description: Fans believed Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce would marry on June 13, 2026. This rumour was based on a resort booking and Swift's lucky number. However, the couple was seen on a date in New York City on June 13. The wedding planner and venue denied the booking. The actual wedding date remains unknown but will occur before late July.

articles.description: South Korea police arrested 11 ticket scalpers outside BTS' concert venue at Busan Asiad Main Stadium after discovering a wristband-transfer scheme used to bypass security. Authorities deployed 70 officers and pledged continued action against illegal ticket reselling at major events.

articles.description: Dia Mirza praised Imtiaz Ali's 'Main Vaapas Aaunga,' calling it a poignant and powerful love story. She lauded the storytelling and performances of Naseeruddin Shah, Diljit Dosanjh, Vedang Raina, and Sharvari, calling it a 'powerful cinematic experience'.

articles.description: Pallavi Chatterjee addressed the controversial kissing scene between her father, Biswajeet, and a young Rekha in 'Anjana Safar'. She stated the incident, where Rekha was allegedly unaware of the planned kiss, was deeply distressing for a 15-year-old and should not have occurred without consent.

articles.title: Drishyam 3 OTT release date confirmed: When and where to watch Mohanlal starrer superhit Malayalam movie. Check language options
articles.description: Mohanlal's blockbuster Malayalam thriller Drishyam 3 is set to make its OTT debut. The film, which has reportedly crossed Rs 330 crore at the worldwide box office, will be available in Malayalam along with dubbed versions in Tamil, Telugu and Kannada. Directed by Jeethu Joseph, the third instalment continues the story of Georgekutty and his family, bringing back key cast members including Meena, Ansiba Hassan, Esther Anil and Siddique.

articles.description: Renowned filmmaker James Gunn has given high praise to Kenji Tanagaki's thrilling film, 'The Furious,' describing it as a breathtaking example of cinematic artistry. After screening the film with his 'Man of Tomorrow' crew, Gunn expressed his astonishment at Tanagaki's remarkable talent.

She later found fulfillment in television, spirituality with the Brahma Kumaris, and a life focused on inner peace, stepping away from Bollywood's glitz.

articles.title: ‚ÄėCivic sense, zero potholes, less honking, functional street lights‚Äô: Indian traveller in Bangkok shares simple things that Indian cities lack
articles.description: Indian cities often fall short on basic amenities like roads and waste management. A traveler's observations in Bangkok reveal a stark contrast. The Thai capital excels in everyday details, from pothole-free roads to civic discipline. This suggests a need to prioritize fundamental upkeep over grand projects. Citizen responsibility and infrastructure maintenance are key to improving urban life.

articles.title: 'They had to actually track me': Suhasini Mulay reveals the wild way how she landed the role of Aamir Khan‚Äôs mother in ‚ÄėLagaan‚Äô

Despite the film's massive success, Mulay notes it didn't significantly boost her career, with 'Dil Chahta Hai' proving more impactful. She highlights Gowariker's meticulous direction and the cast's dedication.

articles.description: Peddi opened to mixed responses from critics and audiences when the film released on June 4. And the actress‚Äô objectification in the film made matters worse as it sparked debates online about the way women are essayed in Telugu films

articles.title: Mythri Movie Distributors LLP & Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Movie Makers Acquire Vijay Antony's Vanda Devullu Telugu Theatrical Rights
articles.description: Blockbuster Distributors Mythri Movie Distributors LLP & Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Movie Makers For Vijay Antony and Director Sasi‚Äôs Emotional Drama Vanda Devullu Known for doing strong content based movies with distinctive concepts, Versatile Star Vijay Antony has built a strong following among Telugu audiences over the years. One of the most memorable milestones in his career came through his collaboration with director Sasi on Bichagadu, a film that transcended expectations and emerged as a sensational success. The duo, celebrated for delivering a deeply moving cinematic experience, joined forces once again for Vanda Devullu, a film that carries a strong emotional core while weaving together drama and intrigue. Backed by Ramanjaneyulu Javvaji under the Sarvanth Ram Creations banner and presented by Fatima Vijay Antony in association with Vijay Antony Film Corporation, Vanda Devullu is positioned as an emotionally charged entertainer that explores human relationships, unexpected twists, and compelling drama, promising a heartfelt and engaging experience on the big screen. Blockbuster distributors Mythri Movie Distributors LLP and Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Movie Makers acquired the theatrical rights of Vanda Devullu for Nizam and Andhra Pradesh respectively. They recently successfully distributed Raakasa which turned out to be a commercial hit. Their association will have an additional benefit for Vanda Devullu. The project has been attracting attention ever since it was announced. Every promotional asset released so far- from posters and songs to glimpse and teaser, has sparked interest and fueled anticipation among moviegoers. With the buzz steadily growing, the film is all set for a grand worldwide theatrical release on June 19. The film brings together a diverse lineup of performers, with Vijay Antony leading a cast that includes Swasika, Ajay, Kavya, Sakthi, Padini, Karnas, Balaji Sakthivel, Divakar, Arul Doss, Bucks, Vinodhini, Munishkanth, and Kodangi Vadivelu, each contributing significantly to the narrative. On the technical front, Vanda Devullu is backed by a skilled team. SB Darshan Kirlosh captures the film‚Äôs visual mood through his cinematography, while Balaji Sriram provides the soundtrack that complements its emotional depth. Editing duties are handled by Harish Yuvaraj, and the dialogues have been crafted by Bhashyasree. Combining an experienced cast, a capable technical crew, and a story rooted in strong emotions, the film is shaping up to be a compelling dramatic entertainer. With its release fast approaching and audience curiosity already on the rise, the makers are preparing an aggressive promotional campaign to take the buzz surrounding the film to the next level. Cast : Vijay Antony, Swasika, Ajay, Lijomol Jose, Kavya, Shakti, Padini, Karnas, Balaji Sakthivel, Divakar, Arul Dass, Bucks, Vinodhini, Munishkanth, Kodangi Vadivelu and others. Technical Crew: Banner: Vijay Antony Film Corporation, Sarvanth Ram Creations Presented by: Fatima Vijay Antony Producer: Ramajanjaneyulu Javvaji Director: Shashi Music: Balaji Sri Ram DOP: SB Darshan Kirlosh Editor: Harish Yuvraj Dialogues: Bhashyasree PRO: Sai Satish
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: Sushant Singh Rajput Death Anniversary: MS Dhoni to Chhichhore, 'SSRians' Recall His Best Films
articles.description: Sushant Singh Rajput was one of the most loved actors in the film industry. His untimely death on June 14, 2020, shocked his entire fandom. To date, he trends on social media. As today marks his sixth death anniversary, fans are trending and recalling his best work. Keep scrolling to know more.

articles.description: More shared an apology on Instagram and said this in his video- "I wanted to talk about this for a long time but my Instagram account was suspended."

articles.title: Sushant Singh Rajput Death Anniversary: Sister Shweta Remembers Late Actor; 'Don't Think Of How He Left But...'
articles.description: Shweta Singh Kirti has penned a moving note on her late brother Sushant Singh Rajput's death anniversary. The Bollywood actor, known for films like Kai Po Che and Chhichhore, passed away on June 14, 2020.

articles.title: 'The Walking Dead': Is a rival on the cards? The future of the franchise takes an unexpected turn as reports suggest Season 12 is in the works
articles.description: Excitement swirls in the fandom as reports surface of a 'Walking Dead' revival that's nearing fruition, potentially serving as a Season 12. With the return of fan-favorites like Rick, Michonne, Daryl, Carol, Maggie, and Negan on the table, this project seeks to resolve the lingering mysteries of the original series and its various spinoffs.

articles.title: 'Peddi will have more acceptance'; Chiranjeevi compares Ram Charan's film with Aamir Khan's 'Dangal'
articles.description: Megastar Chiranjeevi expressed immense pride as his son Ram Charan's performance in 'Peddi' has led many to believe Charan has surpassed him as an actor. Chiranjeevi also recalled advice from SP Balasubrahmanyam about pursuing performance-oriented roles and drew parallels between 'Peddi' and acclaimed sports dramas like 'Dangal', highlighting its unique rustic appeal and social message.

articles.title: Movie dialogue of the day: Iconic ‚ÄėThe Godfather‚Äô line written by Mario Puzo and Francis Ford Coppola that became a cultural phenomenon
articles.description: The Godfather's iconic line, "I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse," spoken by Don Vito Corleone, has transcended cinema to become a cultural touchstone. This phrase, originating from a 1972 crime drama, signifies an offer so compelling, it leaves no room for refusal, reflecting the Corleone family's formidable influence and strategic power.

articles.title: Tarot card reading horoscope today for June 14, 2026: Positive changes are already in motion, zodiacs
articles.description: Tarot Card Reading Horoscope Today For June 14: Step into the mystical realm as the tarot cards reveal what the universe has in store for you today. Whether you`re seeking clarity in love, career, or personal growth, today`s tarot insights offer powerful guidance tailored to your zodiac sign.

articles.title: 'Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata' box office collection day 2: Kangana Ranaut starrer witnesses growth; net earnings cross Rs 2.4 crore
articles.description: Kangana Ranaut's 'Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata' has captured hearts with its portrayal of nurses' heroism during the 26/11 attacks, showing a robust 45% jump in earnings on its second day, bringing in Rs 1.45 crore. Despite fierce competition from other films, it has raked in a total of Rs 2.45 crore, with audiences overwhelmingly praising Ranaut's powerful performance. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: Roundabout | Veteran artist paints the City Beautiful in blues
articles.description: Legendary artist Raj Kumar paints at his own pace, creating wonder each time, never without the blue colour that is universally associated with reliability, calmness and intellect

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na, 'College ke paanch saal...'
articles.description: The iconic dialogue from Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na beautifully captures the nostalgia of college life, reminding us how some of our most cherished years pass by before we even realise it.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Welsh poet Dylan Thomas: 'Do not go gentle into that good night, old age should...' - the raging verse that Bob Dylan, The Beatles, and Christopher Nolan honored
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Dylan Thomas urges people to resist life's inevitable decline. In today's world of burnout, his words champion a fierce, passionate approach to living. This message resonates with those facing challenges like climate change or personal struggles. It means refusing to fade quietly, choosing instead to burn brightly.

articles.title: Parvathy on backlash after speaking out on misogyny in Kasaba: ‚ÄėIt was not about me, it was about all women‚Äô
articles.description: Parvathy had publicly criticised the 2016 Malayalam film Kasaba, specifically its lead actor, Mammootty, for promoting misogyny.
